phase_name: Align constants.py and records.py with Lean export format

objectives.description: Update ProofTrace.from_dict to accept both 'rules' key and 'rules_applied' key
Update DifficultyMetrics.from_dict to accept camelCase keys from Lean
Verify PatternKey.from_dict already handles camelCase correctly (confirmed)

deviations.description: Also fixed formula.py: box required 'child' AND 'event' but Lean emits 'child' only
deviations.reason: formula.py _REQUIRED_FIELDS['box'] had 'event' as required; changed to just 'child' to match Lean export
deviations.annotation: *(deviation: altered — fixed formula.py box validation to match Lean format)*
